evals.name: list-page
evals.prompt: Create a list page for managing documents at `src/app/admin/dokumente/page.tsx`. The page title is 'Dokumente'. The header should have the title and an action button area. The list component is `DocumentsList` from `@/features/documents/lists/DocumentsList`. Use `documentsSearchParamsCache` from `@/features/documents/lists/DocumentsList/documentsSearchParams` for parsing search params (it yields `search` and `pagination`). The button to open the create modal is `OpenCreateDocumentModalButton` from `@/features/documents/modals/CreateDocumentModal/OpenCreateDocumentModalButton`, and the modal itself is `CreateDocumentModal` from `@/features/documents/modals/CreateDocumentModal`.
evals.expected_output: A single page.tsx file that follows the list page shell pattern: metadata, force-dynamic, searchParams with nuqs, PageHeader with title + actions, Suspense-wrapped list inside PageContent, modal at the bottom.
expectations: Has `export const metadata: Metadata` with title using template literal `Dokumente | ${Constants.companyName}` and imports Constants from @/shared/utils/constants
Has `export const dynamic = "force-dynamic"` since this is a list page
Function is async, accepts searchParams typed as `Promise<SearchParams>` (from nuqs/server)
Awaits searchParams before parsing: `await searchParams` then `documentsSearchParamsCache.parse(...)` to extract search and pagination
Uses PageHeader > PageHeaderTitle > Headline as h1 for the title, with getExtracted() for translations
Uses PageHeaderActions containing OpenCreateDocumentModalButton
List component wrapped in `<Suspense fallback={<ListSkeleton />}>` inside PageContent, passing search and pagination as searchParams prop
CreateDocumentModal rendered at the bottom of the JSX, outside PageContent, as a sibling to PageHeader and PageContent

evals.name: sub-page-reusable-header
evals.prompt: Create a sub-page for account details at `src/app/operations/weg-konten/[financingCaseId]/kontodetails/page.tsx`. This is a sub-page under the financing case overview for the FSP portal. Title is 'Kontodetails'. It should use the shared FSP sub-page header. Fetch account details using `getAccountDetails` from `@/shared/backend/models/accountDetails/server` with the financingCaseId as path variable (use fetchWithErrorHandling). The response has a `header` property for the sub-page header. Render `AccountDetailsForm` from `@/features/accountDetails/forms/AccountDetailsForm` inside the content area, passing the response as `defaultValues`.
evals.expected_output: A single page.tsx file that follows the sub-page shell pattern: metadata, params with financingCaseId, FspFinancingCaseOverviewSubPageHeader, and content inside PageContent.
expectations: Has `export const metadata: Metadata` with title using template literal `Kontodetails | ${Constants.companyName}`
Function is async, accepts params typed as `Promise<{ financingCaseId: string }>`
Awaits params before destructuring: `const { financingCaseId } = await params`
Uses `FspFinancingCaseOverviewSubPageHeader` from `@/layouts/fsp/FspFinancingCaseOverviewSubPageHeader` — NOT inline PageHeader composition
Passes `title`, `financingCaseId`, and `header` (from response) to FspFinancingCaseOverviewSubPageHeader
Fetches data with `fetchWithErrorHandling(() => getAccountDetails({ pathVariables: { financingCaseId } }))`
AccountDetailsForm rendered inside PageContent with defaultValues prop
Does NOT have `export const dynamic` (not a list page)

evals.name: inquiry-step-thin-wrapper
evals.prompt: Create an inquiry step page at `src/app/operations/anfragen/weg-konto/[inquiryId]/(inquiry)/bankverbindung/page.tsx`. The title is 'Bankverbindung'. This is part of the HOA account inquiry process. The step's feature page component is `BankDetailsPage` from `@/features/inquiryProcess/common/bankDetails/BankDetailsPage`.
evals.expected_output: A minimal thin-wrapper page.tsx that only handles metadata and param extraction, delegating everything else to the feature page component.
expectations: Has `export const metadata: Metadata` with title using template literal `Bankverbindung | ${Constants.companyName}`
Function is async, accepts params typed as `Promise<{ inquiryId: string }>`
Awaits params before destructuring: `const { inquiryId } = await params`
Renders only `<BankDetailsPage inquiryId={inquiryId} />` — a single feature page component
Does NOT import or render InquiryHeader or InquiryContent (those belong in the feature page component)
Does NOT use getExtracted/getTranslations (no translations needed in the thin wrapper)
Does NOT use PageHeader, PageContent, or any layout primitives — the feature component owns layout

evals.name: auth-page
evals.prompt: Create a forgot password page at `src/app/(auth)/passwort-vergessen/page.tsx`. Title is 'Passwort vergessen'. It should accept a searchParam `emailSent` (string) and show a success banner with the text 'E-Mail wurde erfolgreich gesendet' when it's truthy. Render the `ForgotPasswordForm` from `@/features/auth/forms/forgotPasswordForm`.
evals.expected_output: A single page.tsx file following the auth page pattern: metadata, typed searchParams, Panel + VStack wrapper with Headline, conditional Banner, and form component. No PageHeader.
expectations: Has `export const metadata: Metadata` with title using template literal `Passwort vergessen | ${Constants.companyName}`
Does NOT use PageHeader or PageContent — auth pages use Panel as container
Uses `<Panel p={8}>` as the outermost wrapper
Uses `<VStack gap={8} alignItems="stretch">` inside the Panel
Has `<Headline as="h1">` for the page title inside the VStack
searchParams typed explicitly as `Promise<{ emailSent: string }>` (NOT nuqs SearchParams)
Awaits searchParams before accessing properties
Conditionally renders `<Banner type="success">` when emailSent is truthy
ForgotPasswordForm rendered inside the VStack

evals.name: detail-overview-page
evals.prompt: Create a detail overview page at `src/app/operations/weg-konten/[financingCaseId]/page.tsx`. Title is 'WEG-Konto Übersicht'. Fetch the overview data using `getHoaAccountFinancingCaseOverview` from `@/shared/backend/models/financingCaseOverview/hoaAccount/fsp/server` with financingCaseId as path variable (use fetchWithErrorHandling). The page header is a custom feature component `HoaAccountOverviewPageHeader` from `@/features/financingCaseOverview/hoaAccount/fsp/HoaAccountOverviewPageHeader` — pass it `financingCaseId` and `overviewResponse`. Inside the content area, render `CustomerDetailsTaskGroup` and `InternalTaskGroup` from `@/features/financingCaseOverview/hoaAccount/fsp/taskGroups/`, both receiving `financingCaseId` and `overviewResponse`. Add `ArchiveFinancingCaseModal` from `@/features/financingCaseOverview/common/fsp/modals/archiveFinancingCaseModal` and `AssignCaseManagerModal` from `@/features/caseManagers/modals` at the bottom.
evals.expected_output: A single page.tsx file following the detail overview page pattern: metadata, params, ResetScrollPosition, custom feature header, task groups inside PageContent, modals at the bottom.
expectations: Has `export const metadata: Metadata` with title using template literal `WEG-Konto Übersicht | ${Constants.companyName}`
Function is async, accepts params typed as `Promise<{ financingCaseId: string }>`
Awaits params before destructuring
Has `<ResetScrollPosition />` at the top of the JSX, before the header
Uses the custom feature header component `HoaAccountOverviewPageHeader` with financingCaseId and overviewResponse props — NOT inline PageHeader composition
Fetches data with `fetchWithErrorHandling(() => getHoaAccountFinancingCaseOverview({ pathVariables: { financingCaseId } }))`
Task group components rendered inside PageContent with financingCaseId and overviewResponse props
Both modals (ArchiveFinancingCaseModal, AssignCaseManagerModal) rendered at the bottom, outside PageContent
Does NOT have `export const dynamic` (overview pages don't need force-dynamic)
